seoTitle: Sussex Inlet vs Sutton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Sussex Inlet vs Sutton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sussex Inlet and Sutton.
heading: Sussex Inlet vs Sutton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sussex Inlet, New South Wales and Sutton, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sutton has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Sussex Inlet (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sussex Inlet or Sutton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sussex Inlet has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Sutton scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sussex Inlet scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Sutton scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sussex Inlet or Sutton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sutton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
